task_desc: Define the mapping from 139K individual neurons to the 59 functional groups used by fly-logic.js. Use classification.csv fields: flow (sensory/intrinsic/motor) maps to region type, super_class+class maps to specific groups (e.g., class=visual -> VIS_*, class=olfactory -> OLF_*, class=kenyon_cell -> MB_KC). Write mapping logic in the preprocessing script. Output a lookup table in the binary file (uint16 group_id per neuron). The behavioral layer reads aggregated activation per group as before -- sum of fire states for all neurons in that group, normalized by group size.
